2026-05-01T20:08:53.2514284Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-05-01T20:08:53.2514533Z [36;1m  echo "run_detection=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-05-01T20:08:53.2515286Z [36;1mfi[0m
